subcodes.first_line: O ye who are attracted to the Beauty of Truth! The sweet and glorious Christ - may my life be a sacrifice unto Him - in the Gospel saith [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مجذوبان دلبر حقیقت حضرت مسیح ملیح روح الوجود له الفداء در انجیل میفرماید
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @many are called but few are chosen, @thankfulness; gratitude, @scarcity of receptive souls, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible
